==Biography==
'''Filli Bitters''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with pale [[Hair/Legends|hair]] that he wore spiked, serving as the best [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] onboard the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''.

Filli was about the same age as [[Olee Starstone]], on whom he found to be attractive the moment he met her, but her dedication to the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] led her to forsake attachments. Filli took Olee and [[Roan Shryne]] to [[Jaguada's moon]], from where he hacked into the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] records in a search for [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Jedi Purge]] survivors.

He later reprogrammed a [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]] to kamikaze an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Detainer CC-2200/Legends|Detainer CC-2200 interdictor cruiser]], allowing the ''Drunk Dancer'' and other vessels to escape the Imperial subjugation of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Following the subjugation, Olee eventually decided to slowly allow herself to form attachments.

{{Char-stub}}
